subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God that, through the loving-kindness of the Beloved of all existence, thou hast entered into the stronghold of the love of the All-Merciful and partaken of the outpourings of mercy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله بعنایت محبوب امکان در حصن محبت رحمن وارد شدی و بفیوضات رحمت
subcodes.subjects: @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @love of God
